summary: Frontend testing completed for Klaud Valley Travels landing page. The main bug fix (Destinations tab switching) is working correctly - IntersectionObserver + MutationObserver in App.js and React state-driven fade animation in Destinations.jsx successfully render tab content when switching between 'Now Available' and 'Coming Soon' tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
MutationObserver + IntersectionObserver pattern in App.js correctly handles dynamically rendered elements
Destinations.jsx uses React state (animate) for fade transitions instead of relying solely on CSS .reveal class - good approach for tab content
WhatsApp integration uses correct phone number format (wa.me/919778342424)
All images use lazy loading which is good for performance
seed_data_creation: N/A - Static landing page with no database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Hero section, Navbar navigation, Destinations tabs (bug fix verified), Stays section (5 cards), Booking form with WhatsApp integration, Gallery (9 images), Footer with contact info and quick links, WhatsApp FAB, Mobile menu. No backend APIs - all booking goes through WhatsApp links.

destinations_tab_switching.details: Now Available tab shows Vattavada card with image, description, Book Now button. Coming Soon tab shows 11 destination cards with badges. Tab switching works with fade animation.

vattavada_book_now_button.details: Clicking Book Now scrolls to booking form section

whatsapp_enquiry_form.details: Form has all fields (name, phone, members, date, stay type, location, requests). Submit button would open WhatsApp with pre-filled message.

navbar_navigation.details: All nav links (Home, Destinations, Stays, Book Now, Contact) scroll to correct sections

whatsapp_fab.details: Visible at bottom right with correct href (wa.me/919778342424)

hero_section.details: Heading, CTA buttons (Explore Destinations, Book via WhatsApp), mist overlay all visible

stays_section.details: 5 property type cards visible (Pool, Budget, Premium, Tents, Dormitory)

footer_section.details: Contact info, quick links, social icons all present

mobile_menu.details: Mobile menu toggle works, all nav links visible, closes after navigation
